name: Creepypasta Mansion
description:
You are slendermans new proxy, your now living in a house full of murders and psychopaths. What will you do? Your a murder yourself

Will you try and make a connection with some of them? Or will you stick to yourself, and leave them all alone. Will they come to you? Pick your own path as a mew Creepypasta
